title: IndexRecord
description: Shared per-chunk index document (one record per chunk; many chunks per paper, Q2=C full-text multi-chunk). Written by U1 (VectorIndexWriter) and read by U2 (HybridRetriever) over the SAME embedding space (vector-spec.md §2, §4). Card fields (FR-4) project to U2 ResultCardVM (dtos.md §1.1). Internal fields (vector, lexicalTerms, chunkId, section, categories — and the full `abstract`; the snippet, not the full abstract, is the exposed card field) are NOT exposed in external DTOs; the externally exposed card projection is the 6 fields in dtos.md §1.1 (SEC-9, per dtos.md §1.1/§4).

ArxivCategory.description: An arXiv category code within the corpus slice (e.g. cs.LG, cs.AI, cs.CL, cs.CV, stat.ML). Trace: C-6.

DocModelBlockRef.description: Structured DocModel block reference covered by this chunk. Trace: FR-18, QT-9.

chunkId.description: Deterministic chunkId(paperId, ordinal). Serves as the index document ID (idempotent upsert key). Trace: BR-5, BR-9, PBT P2/P3.

paperId.description: Version-less arXiv ID (canonical identifier). Trace: BR-3.

version.description: arXiv version vN currently indexed. Trace: BR-3, BR-14.

vector.description: Chunk embedding (cosine space, inputType=search_document). 1024-dim per the FROZEN embedding contract (vector-spec.yaml). INTERNAL — not exposed in external DTOs (SEC-9). Trace: vector-spec.md §1.

section.description: Source section of the chunk (abstract / body section). INTERNAL — not exposed in external DTOs (SEC-9). Trace: BR-5.

lexicalTerms.description: Analyzed chunk-body text for lexical retrieval (FR-2). Title and abstract are written once in their own analyzed fields; U2 queries title + abstract + lexicalTerms together, with boost tuning deferred to search quality work and no reindex required. INTERNAL — not exposed in external DTOs (SEC-9). Trace: BR-6.

blockRefs.description: Structured DocModel block refs covered by this chunk. Empty only for legacy/plain-text chunks. INTERNAL provenance used by QT-9 BlockRef validation; not searched or exposed externally. Trace: BR-C8, BR-C13, QT-9.

title.description: Card field (FR-4). Paper title. Projects to ResultCardVM.title (dtos.md §1.1).

authors.description: Card field (FR-4). Authors. Projects to ResultCardVM.authors (dtos.md §1.1).

year.description: Card field (FR-4). Publication year. Projects to ResultCardVM.year (dtos.md §1.1).

arxivId.description: Card field (FR-4). Display arXiv ID (may include version). Projects to ResultCardVM.arxivId (dtos.md §1.1).

abstract.description: Full abstract; source for abstractSnippet derivation. vector-spec.md §2 lists `abstract` in the card-field group as the snippet SOURCE, but per dtos.md §1.1 the full abstract is NOT itself exposed on the card — only the derived `abstractSnippet` is. Trace: FR-4, FR-5.

abstractSnippet.description: Card field (FR-4). Card abstract snippet (derived from full abstract). Projects to ResultCardVM.abstractSnippet (dtos.md §1.1).

arxivUrl.description: Card field (FR-4/FR-5). Resolvable real link (grounding — no fabrication). Projects to ResultCardVM.arxivUrl (dtos.md §1.1). U6.GroundingEnforcementHook validates at the response edge.

categories.description: arXiv categories (corpus slice cs.LG/cs.AI/cs.CL/cs.CV/stat.ML). INTERNAL — not exposed in external DTOs (SEC-9). Trace: C-6.
